name: legal-contract-review
description: Clause-by-clause contract review with GREEN/YELLOW/RED flags against knowledge/legal/playbook.md — not legal advice

steps.text: Paste the contract (or key sections) into the next legal step prompt or run with --legal after pasting in chat. Attorney review required.

steps.prompt:
Run skill legal-playbook procedure **review-contract** against knowledge/legal/playbook.md (and any other knowledge/legal/*.md).
If the user has not pasted contract text, ask for: document type, parties if known, and the full text or material clauses.
If text is present in this conversation or knowledge files, produce:
1) Verdict first (Approve path / Negotiate / Escalate / Insufficient text)
2) Parties / law / term summary
3) Clause flag table (Topic | Flag | Issue | Redline)
4) Top RED items detailed
5) Missing sections vs playbook
6) Counsel gate line
Do not invent law. Not legal advice.

steps.action: Acknowledge this is not legal advice and counsel must review before signature
steps.detail: Human confirms outputs are triage/draft only.
